translations.Control document signing workflows insid: Control document signing workflows inside Nextcloud
translations.**LibreSign helps organizations manage d:
**LibreSign helps organizations manage document signing inside Nextcloud.**

It is built for teams that need clear signing rules, traceable actions, and workflows that follow internal processes and legal requirements.

**What LibreSign enables**

- Define signing order and signer roles
- Support internal and external signers
- Keep a traceable record of requests and validations
- Use digital certificates for compliant signing workflows
- Validate documents using QR codes
- Work directly with Nextcloud files and users
- Integrate signing with other systems through APIs

**Support LibreSign**
If your organization uses LibreSign, support its development:

[![Sponsor](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=Sponsor&message=%E2%9D%A4&logo=GitHub&color=%23fe8e86)](https://github.com/sponsors/libresign)

For enterprise support, contact LibreCode:
https://libresign.coop

translations.Parallel workers is managed by the exter: Parallel workers is managed by the external worker service.
translations.TSA password remains in secure storage a: TSA password remains in secure storage and is not changed here.
translations.Anyone with the validation URL can acces: Anyone with the validation URL can access the validation page.
translations.Accounts must be authenticated to access: Accounts must be authenticated to access the validation page URL.
translations.Not mandatory, leave blank to use the de: Not mandatory, leave blank to use the default value.
translations.To generate new signatures, you must fir: To generate new signatures, you must first generate the root certificate.
translations.Regenerate root certificate will invalid: Regenerate root certificate will invalidate all signatures keys. Do you confirm this action?
translations.Full name of the main company or main pe: Full name of the main company or main person of this instance
translations.Select the signature engine to sign the: Select the signature engine to sign the documents
translations.Help us continue developing and maintain: Help us continue developing and maintaining LibreSign
translations.LibreSign is developed with ❤️ by LibreC: LibreSign is developed with ❤️ by LibreCode coop. Your support helps us maintain and improve this free and open-source project.
translations.A verification code has been sent to: {c: A verification code has been sent to: {contact}. Check your email and enter the 6-digit verification code.
A verification code has been sent to: {contact}. Please enter the code to continue.
translations.{method} is not configured. Please conta: {method} is not configured. Please contact your administrator.
translations.To verify your identity, enter the same: To verify your identity, enter the same email address where you received the signature request. We will send a verification code to this address.
translations.To sign this document, we must verify yo: To sign this document, we must verify your identity. Enter your contact information to receive a verification code.
You can now sign the document.
You do not have any signature defined.
translations.You need to upload your certificate to s: You need to upload your certificate to sign the document.
Define a password and sign the document.
translations.Signing is blocked until the certificate: Signing is blocked until the certificate validation issue is resolved.
translations.Confirm that you want to sign this docum: Confirm that you want to sign this document.
translations.Enter your signature password to sign th: Enter your signature password to sign the document.
translations.Enter the ID or UUID of the document to: Enter the ID or UUID of the document to validate.
translations.Failed to add files to envelope: Failed to add files to envelope
translations.Failed to remove file(s) from envelope: Failed to remove file(s) from envelope
translations.A default for everyone already exists. U: A default for everyone already exists. Use Change to update it.
translations.A higher-level rule is blocking new exce: A higher-level rule is blocking new exceptions in all scopes.
translations.Affects all accounts in a group: Affects all accounts in a group
translations.Control whether signer IP address and us: Control whether signer IP address and user agent are stored when signing documents.
translations.Groups and accounts can set their own ru: Groups and accounts can set their own rule
translations.Groups and accounts must follow this val: Groups and accounts must follow this value

translations.Lower-level customization is disabled fo: Lower-level customization is disabled for this setting
translations.Name of the folder that will contain the: Name of the folder that will contain the account's digital certificate, visible signature images, and other files related to LibreSign.
translations.Control which PDF changes remain allowed: Control which PDF changes remain allowed after signing and help readers detect disallowed modifications.
translations.Configure expiration and renewal timing: Configure expiration and renewal timing for signing requests.
translations.Control whether signers must submit iden: Control whether signers must submit identification documents for approval.
translations.Ways to identify a person who will sign: Ways to identify a person who will sign a document.
translations.This information will appear on the vali: This information will appear on the validation page
translations.Configure automatic reminder cadence, ma: Configure automatic reminder cadence, max attempts, and daily send time.
translations.Define which groups may create signature: Define which groups may create signature requests within this scope. Delegated group admins may authorize only groups they manage.
translations.Group admins can define scope-specific r: Group admins can define scope-specific requester groups
translations.Group admins must inherit the system req: Group admins must inherit the system requester groups
translations.Choose whether documents are signed in o: Choose whether documents are signed in order or all at once.
translations.Manage footer visibility, QR code behavi: Manage footer visibility, QR code behavior, validation URL, and footer template customization.
translations.Configure signature stamp template, dime: Configure signature stamp template, dimensions, render mode, and background.
translations.Choose how LibreSign processes signature: Choose how LibreSign processes signatures and configure background workers when needed.
translations.Configure asynchronous signing job proce: Configure asynchronous signing job processing and concurrency.
translations.Configure trusted timestamp evidence (TS: Configure trusted timestamp evidence (TSA) applied when digitally signing documents.
translations.Control whether the validation page URL: Control whether the validation page URL requires authentication.
Blocked by a locked default rule.
translations.This setting cannot be configured at thi: This setting cannot be configured at this scope.
translations.Could not save this rule. Check your per: Could not save this rule. Check your permissions and selected values.
translations.Mode is required when signature flow is: Mode is required when signature flow is enabled.
translations.Invalid signature flow mode. Use \"paral: Invalid signature flow mode. Use "parallel" or "ordered_numeric".
Document isn't signed or corrupted data.
translations.Unknown issue with Certificate or corrup: Unknown issue with Certificate or corrupted data.
translations.You are not allowed to request signing: You are not allowed to request signing
translations.Changes have been made in a file that yo: Changes have been made in a file that you have to sign.

translations.LibreSign: Changes into a file for you t: LibreSign: Changes into a file for you to sign
translations.LibreSign: There is a file for you to si: LibreSign: There is a file for you to sign
translations.Date when the signer sent the request to: Date when the signer sent the request to sign (without time, in their local time zone).
translations.Date and time when the signer sent the r: Date and time when the signer sent the request to sign (in their local time zone).
translations.Time zone of signer when sent the reques: Time zone of signer when sent the request to sign (in their local time zone).
Choose the file to request signatures.
translations.Select authorized groups that can reques: Select authorised groups that can request to sign documents. Admin group is the default group and don't need to be defined.
translations.Remove custom name entry from root certi: Remove custom name entry from root certificate
translations.Enabling this feature, every time a docu: Enabling this feature, every time a document is signed, LibreSign will store the IP address and user agent of the signer.
translations.Collect signers'metadata when signing a: Collect signers' metadata when signing a document
translations.Control whether a confetti animation is: Control whether a confetti animation is shown after a document is signed.
translations.Controls external CRL validation when si: Controls external CRL validation when signing with personal certificates.
The PHP LDAP extension is not installed. Users with certificates that use LDAP-based CRL Distribution Points will not be able to sign documents.
translations.External CRL validation is disabled. Rev: External CRL validation is disabled. Revocation of certificates from external authorities will not be checked. Certificates issued by LibreSign are not affected.
translations.Name of the folder that will contain the: Name of the folder that will contain the user's digital certificate, visible signature images, and other files related to LibreSign.
translations.DocMDP defines what types of changes are: DocMDP defines what types of changes are allowed in a PDF after it is signed, ensuring viewers can detect unauthorized modifications.
translations.Default certification level for new sign: Default certification level for new signatures:
Enable or disable the envelopes feature. When enabled, users can group several files into an envelope and manage them as a single signing process.
translations.Enable envelopes (group multiple files i: Enable envelopes (group multiple files into one signing flow)
translations.Rules for controlling the expiration of: Rules for controlling the expiration of a request to sign a file.
translations.Maximum validity in seconds of a request: Maximum validity in seconds of a request to sign.
translations.The flow of identification documents wil: The flow of identification documents will make it mandatory for anyone who must sign a file, to send their identification documents, this, in order for them to be approved by some member of the approval group. The user can only create the certificate after these are approved.
translations.Select authorized groups that can reques: Select authorized groups that can request to sign documents. Admin group is the default group and doesn't need to be defined.
translations.Request to create account when the user: Request to create account when the user does not have an account
translations.Follow up with automatic reminders. Sign: Follow up with automatic reminders. Signers will receive reminders until they sign or decline.
translations.The first message is not considered a no: The first message is not considered a notification
Zero or empty is no reminder.
translations.Full name of the main company or main us: Full name of the main company or main user of this instance
translations.Signers are organized by signing order n: Signers are organized by signing order number. Only those with the lowest pending order number can sign.
translations.Signature template content is overflowin: Signature template content is overflowing. Reduce the text.
translations.Configure the content displayed with the: Configure the content displayed with the signature. The text template uses Twig syntax: https://twig.symfony.com/
translations.If no background image or signature temp: If no background image or signature template is provided, no visible signature will be added to the document.
translations.Sign documents asynchronously in the bac: Sign documents asynchronously in the background
translations.You must manage and keep the external wo: You must manage and keep the external worker running manually.
translations.Nextcloud manages the background worker: Nextcloud manages the background worker automatically.
translations.Configure how many background workers sh: Configure how many background workers should process signing jobs in parallel. More workers increase throughput but consume more resources. Valid range: 1-32.
translations.Example: 1.2.3.4.1 or leave empty for de: Example: 1.2.3.4.1 or leave empty for default
translations.Timestamp Authority (TSA) settings for d: Timestamp Authority (TSA) settings for digitally signing documents.
